description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a brick exterior and a flat roof. The front facade features a central entryway with a small overhang supported by columns, flanked by symmetrical windows and a single-car garage to the left. The rear of the house includes a large glass sliding door leading to a patio area, and multiple windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a continuation of the brickwork. The house sits on a green lawn with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design is boxy and modern, with clean lines and a practical layout.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, central entryway, garage, and large rear windows, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with overhang, symmetrical windows, and a garage on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the garage's side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large glass sliding door, patio area, and multiple windows.
description_view_3: Right side view with plain brickwork and a few windows, showing the side lawn and walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, large glass doors at rear, scattered side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small overhang, steps, double doors, and decorative greenery
